item.title: {{ report.date }} 气象行业情报日报
item.description:
今日概览

共 {{ report.summary.total }} 条情报

  • 🔴 紧急: {{ report.summary.urgent }}
  • 🟡 高优先级: {{ report.summary.high }}
  • 🟢 中优先级: {{ report.summary.medium }}
{% for category in report.categories %}

{{ category.name }} ({{ category.entries|length }})

    {% for item in category.entries[:5] %}
  • {{ item.title }} {% if item.province %}[{{ item.province }}]{% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
